title: Combination A: Draw the Molecule
bodyText: Draw 1-butanol, $C_4H_{10}O$, in the molecule editor. The answer is checked as a SMILES string.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show the final combined spectrum evidence and the target molecular formula before drawing.
Mock 3D molecule figure: normally this would show a small reference structure in the molecule viewer; this placeholder uses the available water PDB asset.

incorrectFeedback: Not quite. Draw a straight four-carbon chain with the OH group on carbon 1.
